---
name: Bug report
about: Something went wrong while generating or placing assets
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the problem.

**What you asked Claude to do**
The exact prompt you gave (the scene or asset description).

**What you expected instead**

**Which step failed**
If you can tell, roughly where it broke: planning / cost estimate / generation / polling / download or import into Blender / placement. Paste the error message Claude showed, if any.

**Connectors**
- Alpha3D MCP connected and authenticated? (yes/no)
- Blender MCP bridge connected with its server running? (yes/no, and which bridge, e.g. BlenderMCP)

**Environment**
- Claude client + version (e.g. Claude Code v2.1.x):
- Blender version:
- OS:

**Credits**
Did any generation get submitted? If so, roughly how many credits (this helps tell a planning bug from a generation bug). Failed jobs auto-refund, so note whether anything actually completed.

**Anything else**
Screenshots of the Blender result, console output, or other context.
